item.name: Oxydoras
item.description:
If it looks like a bludgeon in the water, and floats like a bludgeon in the water...it may not be a bludgeon in the water. It might be this catfish instead.

[Suitable for display in aquariums tier 3 and higher.]
[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: The flanks of this large wavekin are covered with a row of spines, leading some to consider its viability as a kind of scaly, living cudgel. Some ideas are best nipped in the bud before foolhardy hands are ripped to shreds by indignant catfish.
